transcript: Good morning, thank you for calling Safaricom customer care, my name is Grace. How may I assist you today? I understand you are having trouble with your M-PESA transfer. Let me look into that for you right away. I can see the transaction was delayed due to network issues. I have initiated a reversal which should reflect in 24 hours. Is there anything else I can help you with? Thank you for calling and have a wonderful day.
Hello. What do you want? Your M-PESA is not working? Just try again later. I cannot do anything about that. Bye.

Welcome to customer support. I hear that your account balance is showing incorrectly. That must be frustrating. Let me check your recent transactions. I see there was a system update that may have caused a display error. Your actual balance is correct and I will escalate this display issue to our technical team. You should see it fixed within 48 hours. Can I help with anything else? Thank you for your patience.
Customer care speaking. You want to change your M-PESA PIN? OK hold on. Still checking. OK you need to go to the M-PESA menu and select change PIN. Enter your old PIN then your new PIN. Done.

Good afternoon, this is James from Safaricom. How can I make your day better? I understand you received a fraudulent message asking for your PIN. You were right not to respond. Let me flag this number in our system to protect other customers. I also recommend changing your PIN as a precaution. Would you like me to walk you through that? Great, let me guide you step by step. All done! Your account is now secure. Thank you for reporting this.

Yeah hello. You say your money was sent to wrong number? How much? When did you send it? Let me check. OK I see the transaction. I will start a reversal process. It takes 5 business days. Anything else? OK bye.

Thank you for calling. My name is Amina. I see from your account that you have been a loyal customer for 5 years. How can I help you today? You would like to increase your M-PESA transaction limit? I completely understand why that would be useful for your business. Let me check your eligibility. Based on your transaction history you qualify for the enhanced limit. I have processed the upgrade and it will be active within 2 hours. I have also noted some promotional offers that might benefit your business. Shall I explain those? Thank you so much for choosing Safaricom.
Hello customer. What is the problem? You cannot register for M-PESA? Do you have your ID? Go to the nearest agent with your ID and they will register you. That is all I can tell you. Goodbye.

Good evening and thank you for reaching out to us. I am sorry to hear about the unauthorized transaction on your account. I can see how concerning that must be. Let me immediately secure your account by temporarily suspending M-PESA services. Now let me investigate the transaction. I need to place you on a brief hold while I check with our fraud team. Thank you for waiting. I have confirmed this was unauthorized and initiated a full reversal. Your account is now secured with a new temporary PIN. Please change it at your earliest convenience. I have also filed a fraud report. Is there anything else I can do for you?
Hi. M-PESA down? Yeah it happens sometimes. Just wait. Maybe try tomorrow. I do not know when it will be back. OK anything else? No? Bye then.
